name: Cambridge Flow dual-rotor axial descent
note: Small fixed-pitch rotor wind-tunnel study; peak mean loss/fluctuation band is the strongest direct small-prop anchor in this packet.

name: NASA Johnson rotorcraft VRS model
note: Broad rotorcraft VRS model anchor; use as a regime sanity check, not an FPV torque/buffet lookup.

name: Shetty/Selig small-scale propellers in VRS
note: AIAA small-scale fixed-pitch propeller VRS experiment with thrust/power curves in axial descent; text reports maximum thrust fluctuations of about +/-30% near the minimum-thrust advance ratio. Digitize figures before coefficient fitting.

name: NASA/Drexel COTS quadrotor vertical descent
note: Open multirotor wind-tunnel reference for vertical-descent disturbances and thrust-loss scale; it is platform-specific and should not overwrite induced-velocity normalization.

name: gym-pybullet-drones cf2x downwash
note: Open-source nearby-drone downwash model; it supports having a wake term but does not directly calibrate this project's self-propwash torque.
